article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.3. Statutory Right-Of-Way - 4111 Norland Avenue 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on granting BC Hydro access to City land at 4111 Norland Avenue
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on allowing BC Hydro to access a portion of City-owned land at 4111 Norland Avenue so it can install and maintain electrical infrastructure needed to power the new Community Safety Building.
